HERA GROUP S.p.A. — IT Cloud Commitment Report
AWS Enterprise Discount Program — Q1 2026

=== COMMITMENT AWS EDP ===

Commitment AWS tramite Enterprise Discount Program (EDP).

Dettagli:
  Provider: AWS
  Tipo contratto: EDP (Enterprise Discount Program)
  Commitment annuale: 190.000 EUR
  Periodo: 2026-01-01 — 2026-12-31
  Rif. contratto: AWS-EDP-HERA-2026-0011

Workload AWS: analytics big data (Amazon EMR), object storage (S3),
funzioni serverless (Lambda) per pipeline dati ambientali.
